description: Register a Databricks workspace resource for use by other components

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key used to register this resource. Other components reference it via resource_key.

token_env_var.label: Token Env Var
token_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the Databricks personal access token

cluster_id.label: Cluster ID
cluster_id.description: Default cluster ID for job submissions
